# Initial Issue Drafts

This directory mirrors `CONTRIBUTOR_TASKS.md` as ready-to-create GitHub issues.

The local environment currently has SSH push access, but no GitHub CLI or GitHub token for issue creation. Use `scripts/create-github-issues.sh` after installing/authenticating `gh`, or copy these drafts into GitHub Issues manually.

## Good first issue

1. [Add examples for routing policies](./01-routing-policy-examples.md)
2. [Improve dashboard empty states](./02-dashboard-empty-states.md)
3. [Add CLI help snapshots](./03-cli-help-snapshots.md)
